text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: WOOHOO! I like anything that's fun!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It appears all of us<n>gathered here
today have an aptitude<n>for charming people!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Not sure if it has anything to do<n>with
attitude, but I'm always down to<n>have a good
time!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Why stay quiet when we could get<n>the
crowd to make some noise?!<n>Festivals, opera,
sepak takraw—you<n>name it! I welcome all of the
above! ☆

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah. While we're here, shall we form a<n>theater
trio? We can call our troupe the<n>"Black Gold
Opera O"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
BWAHAHA! Is it black or is it gold?<n>Opera O's
not even a color!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A theater group? That sounds fun! We<n>better
start practicing our singing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's try and sing in unison!<n>Ready? And—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... We are cacophonous! This, my<n>friends, is
art!
